issues.description: Account secondary pages do not reliably round-trip back to Account. In `mini/lib/shell-navigation.js`, `returnToAccountSurface()` always calls `wx.navigateBack({ delta: 1 })` whenever `navigateBack` exists and never falls back to `redirectTo('/pages/account/index')` or `switchTab(...)` if the leaf page is the current stack root. Opening Settings/About/Privacy/Help as an entry page or restored page therefore leaves the back action failing instead of returning to Account, which breaks VAL-PUBLISH-005's usable round-trip requirement.

sharedStateObservations: Commit `c21dcfa4` registers real Home, Watch, and Account primary surfaces plus the Settings/About/Privacy/Help leaf pages in `mini/app.json`.

The primary shell surfaces share `mini/styles/shell.wxss` and objective dark-premium tokens such as the `#05070B` root background, restrained `#1ED760` accent usage, and elevated `shell-surface-card` containers, which aligns with VAL-PUBLISH-008.
Home, Watch, and Account responsibilities are explicitly differentiated in `mini/lib/shell-navigation.js`, the page wiring, and the generated `mini/dist/validation-summary.json`.
